rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes only when valid in that scope.
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Only include assumptions and guarantees with concrete bounds or named constants in type scopes.
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations; avoid invalid type references.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations must use valid AGREE scalar types and visible identifiers.
Boolean expressions should only reference AGREE bool types in scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not generate range comparisons or 0/1 equality over opaque Boolean data ports.
